name: pyqtwebengine-qt5

metadata.name: PyQtWebEngine-Qt5
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pyqtwebengine-qt5==5.15.15

documentation:
This package contains the subset of a Qt installation that is required by
PyQtWebEngine.  It would normally be installed automatically by pip when
you install PyQtWebEngine.

This package is licensed under the terms of the LGPL v3.
